name: @uatp/parser-js
description: Parser, validator, CLI, and prompt transpilers for UATP 0.1.
author: Smartlabs Medya Teknolojileri AŞ

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check test/conformance.test.js
scripts.validate:examples: node src/cli.js validate ../../examples/debug_code.yaml && node src/cli.js validate ../../examples/review_code.yaml && node src/cli.js validate ../../examples/summarize.yaml
